import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './ReportDetail.css'; const ReportDetail = ({ report, onBack }) => { const [downloadFormat, setDownloadFormat] = useState('pdf'); if (!report) { return (

No report available

); } const handleDownload = () => { alert(`Report download as ${downloadFormat.toUpperCase()} initiated`); // In a real app, this would download the file }; const handlePrint = () => { window.print(); }; // Calculate metrics const totalReadings = report.metrics?.total_readings || 0; const failureCount = report.metrics?.failure_count || 0; const normalCount = totalReadings - failureCount; const failureRate = totalReadings > 0 ? ((failureCount / totalReadings) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0; return (
{/* Report Header */}

Maintenance Report: {report.machine_name}

{report.machine_id}

{/* Main Report Content */}
{/* Executive Summary */}

📊 Executive Summary

📈

Total Readings

{totalReadings}

✓

Normal Operations

{normalCount}

0 ? 'alert' : ''}`}>
⚠️

Failures Detected

{failureCount}

📊

Failure Rate

{failureRate}%

{/* Sensor Averages */}

🌡️ Average Sensor Values (Last 7 Days)

Temperature
{report.metrics?.avg_temperature?.toFixed(1) || 'N/A'}°C
Normal: 20-90°C
Pressure
{report.metrics?.avg_pressure?.toFixed(1) || 'N/A'} bar
Normal: 0-80 bar
Vibration
{report.metrics?.avg_vibration?.toFixed(2) || 'N/A'} mm/s
Normal: {'<'}2.3 mm/s
Flow Rate
{report.metrics?.avg_flow_rate?.toFixed(0) || 'N/A'} L/min
Varies by equipment
Humidity
{report.metrics?.avg_humidity?.toFixed(1) || 'N/A'}%
Ambient monitor
{/* Recommendations */} {report.recommendations && Array.isArray(report.recommendations) && report.recommendations.length > 0 && (

💡 Recommendations

{report.recommendations.map((rec, idx) => (
{idx + 1}

{rec}

))}
)} {/* Health Status */}

💪 Machine Health Status

{failureCount === 0 ? (

✓ Equipment in Good Condition

No failure predictions detected in the last 7 days. Continue regular monitoring.

) : (

⚠️ Maintenance Required

{failureCount} failure(s) predicted in the last 7 days. Schedule maintenance immediately.

)}
{/* Report Info */}

Generated: {new Date().toLocaleString()}

Period: Last 7 Days

{/* Footer Action */}
); }; export default ReportDetail;
